name: matchup_reason_clarity
display_sections: 構成診断: 相性理由
詳細診断: 有利 / 不利理由
rules: All implemented target heroes must have one row for each shared enemy hero.
matchup_rating must be 0-10 and verdict must be derived from the rating.
Each row must explain advantage_reason, disadvantage_reason, win_condition, and loss_condition.
The UI must not show only a numeric matchup score without a reason block.
